entries.source: Our Policy on “Do Not Track” Signals:
entries.value: Ons beleid vir "Do Not Track"-signalen:

entries.source: Our Service allows you to post, link, store, share and otherwise make available certain information, text, graphics, videos, or other material (“Content”). You are responsible for Content that you post on or through Service, including its legality, reliability, and appropriateness. By posting Content on or through Service, You represent and warrant that: (i) Content is yours (you own it) and/or you have the right to use it and the right to grant us the rights and license as provided in these Terms, and (ii) that the posting of your Content on or through Service does not violate the privacy rights, publicity rights, copyrights, contract rights or any other rights of any person or entity. We reserve the right to terminate the account of anyone found to be infringing on a copyright. You retain any and all of your rights to any Content you submit, post or display on or through Service and you are responsible for protecting those rights. We take no responsibility and assume no liability for Content you or any third party posts on or through Service. However, by posting Content using Service you grant us the right and license to use, modify, publicly perform, publicly display, reproduce, and distribute such Content on and through Service. You agree that this license includes the right for us to make your Content available to other users of Service, who may also use your Content subject to these Terms. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) has the right but not the obligation to monitor and edit all Content provided by users. In addition, Content found on or through this Service are the property of Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) or used with permission. You may not distribute, modify, transmit, reuse, download, repost, copy, or use said Content, whether in whole or in part, for commercial purposes or for personal gain, without express advance written permission from us.
entries.value: Ons Diens laat jou toe om sekere inligting, teks, grafika, video's of ander materiaal ("Content") te plaas, te skakel, te stoor, te deel of andersins beskikbaar te stel. Jy is verantwoordelik vir Content wat jy op of deur die Diens plaas, insluitend die wettigheid, betroubaarheid en gepastheid daarvan. Deur Content op of deur die Diens te plaas, verklaar en waarborg jy dat: (i) die Content joune is (jy besit dit) en/of dat jy die reg het om dit te gebruik en om aan ons die regte en lisensie te gee soos in hierdie Terms bepaal; en (ii) dat die plaas van jou Content op of deur die Diens nie die privaatheidsregte, publisiteitsregte, kopieregte, kontrakregte of enige ander regte van enige persoon of entiteit skend nie. Ons behou die reg voor om die rekening van enigiemand te beëindig wat bevind word dat hulle kopiereg skend. Jy behou al jou regte op enige Content wat jy indien, plaas of vertoon op of deur die Diens, en jy is verantwoordelik om daardie regte te beskerm. Ons aanvaar geen verantwoordelikheid of aanspreeklikheid vir Content wat jy of enige derde party op of deur die Diens plaas nie. Deur Content met die Diens te plaas, gee jy egter aan ons die reg en lisensie om sodanige Content op en deur die Diens te gebruik, te wysig, openbaar uit te voer, openbaar te vertoon, te reproduseer en te versprei. Jy stem in dat hierdie lisensie die reg insluit om jou Content aan ander gebruikers van die Diens beskikbaar te stel, wat jou Content ook onderhewig aan hierdie Terms mag gebruik. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) het die reg, maar nie die verpligting nie, om alle Content wat deur gebruikers verskaf word te monitor en te redigeer. Daarbenewens is Content wat op of deur hierdie Diens gevind word die eiendom van Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ), of word dit met toestemming gebruik. Jy mag genoemde Content nie versprei, wysig, oordra, hergebruik, aflaai, weer plaas, kopieer of gebruik nie, hetsy geheel of gedeeltelik, vir kommersiële doeleindes of persoonlike voordeel, sonder ons uitdruklike vooraf skriftelike toestemming.

entries.source: Our Service may contain links to other sites that are not operated by us. If you click a third party link, you will be directed to that third party’s site. We strongly advise you to review the Privacy Policy of every site you visit. We assume no responsibility for the content, privacy policies or practices of any third party sites or services.

Ons raai jy sterk aan wat privaatheidsbeleid van elke site wat jy besoek te besluitkijken. Ons aanvaar geen verantwoordelikheid vir die inhoud, privaatheidsbeleide of praktyke van sites of dienste van derde partye.

entries.source: Pages are designed to move people from explanation into a live mode, prompt, quiz, or review loop.

entries.source: Parents are often trying to help without taking over. inspir gives families public modes that make learning behavior visible: hints, questions, explain-back, review, and study planning.
entries.value: Ouders probeer dikwels te help sonder wat oor te neem. inspir geeft gesinne openbare modusse wat leergedrag sigbaar maak: wenke, vrae, verduidelik in eie woorde, herhaling en studiebebeplanning.

entries.source: Parse the visual, identify relationships, explain uncertainty, and turn it into a learning step.

entries.source: Paste a question, your answer, and the expected answer if you have it. Your buddy explains the reasoning and helps you avoid the same mistake next time.
entries.value: Plak 'n vraag, jou antwoord en die verwagte antwoord as jy dit het. Jou maat verduidelik die redenasie en help jou om volgende keer dieselfde fout te vermy.

entries.source: Philosophy Lab
entries.value: Filosofie-laboratorium

entries.source: Philosophy Lab AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Explore identity, knowledge, fairness, freedom, happiness, and other deep questions through careful reasoning.
entries.value: Philosophy Lab AI Learning Mode is 'n gefokusde manier om AI te gebruik om te leer in plaas van passief antwoorde te versamel. Die modus is gebou rondom 'n spesifieke taak: identiteit, kennis, geregtigheid, vryheid, geluk en ander diepe vrae verkennen via zorgvuldig redeneer.

entries.source: Philosophy Lab AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Philosophy Lab AI Learning Mode: praktiese gids

entries.value: Philosophy Lab-prompts en studielus

entries.source: philosophy tutor AI
entries.value: AI-tutor vir filosofie

entries.source: Photosynthesis: the process plants use to make food.
entries.value: Fotosynthese: wat proses waarmee planten voedsel maak.

entries.source: Pick any topic and face a focused 10-question multiple-choice quiz. You answer one question at a time, get instant feedback, and finish with a score and review.
entries.value: Kies enige onderwerp en voltooi 'n gefokusde meervoudigekeusevasvra van 10 vrae. Jy beantwoord een vraag op 'n slag, kry onmiddellike terugvoer, en eindig met 'n telling en oorsig.

entries.source: Pick any topic and go head-to-head in a real debate. Choose a side, get challenged, and learn to make better arguments.
entries.value: Kies enige onderwerp en gaan kop-aan-kop in 'n werklike debat. Kies 'n kant, word uitgedaag, en leer om beter argumente te maak.

entries.value: Kies hersieningsteikens

entries.source: Pick the learning job first, then jump into the right public guest mode, starter prompt, study path, or guide without hunting through a generic chatbot.

entries.value: Oefen viva, mondelinge eksamens, projekverdedigings en vinnige opvolgvrae met kalm terugvoer.

entries.source: Practice, not answer-copying
entries.value: Oefening, nie antwoordkopiëring nie

entries.source: Practise inside the lesson
entries.value: Oefen binne die les

entries.source: Practise recall
entries.value: Oefen herroeping

entries.source: Practise retrieval before rereading
entries.value: Oefen herwinvordering voordat jy herlees

entries.source: Practise saying it
entries.value: Oefen wat zeggen

entries.source: Predict grades and plan score targets
entries.value: Voorspel grade en beplan teikens

entries.source: Predict what the code or data should do before asking for help.
entries.value: Voorspel wat die kode of data sou moet doen voordat jy om hulp vra.

entries.source: Predict what the code or data should do before asking.
entries.value: Voorspel wat die kode of data sou moet doen voordat jy die vra.

entries.source: Predict, explain, test mentally or safely, and reflect on evidence.
entries.value: Voorspel, verduidelik uit, test mentaal of veilig en reflecteer op bewyse.

entries.source: Prefer lesson blocks, maps, simulations, contrast pairs, rubrics, and concise coach prompts over free-form lecture.
entries.value: Gee die voorkeur aan lesblokken, kaarte, simulaties, contrastparen, rubrics en beknopte afrigterprompts bo vrye colleges.

entries.source: Prepare a deep work session with a clear outcome, constraints, focus rules, review checkpoint, and fallback plan.
entries.value: Berei 'n diepwerksessie voor met 'n duidelike uitkoms, beperkings, fokusreëls, hersieningskontrolepunt en 'n rugsteunplan.

entries.source: Prepare clear forum questions, replies, summaries, and follow-up requests that make student discussions more useful.
entries.value: Berei duidelike forumvrae, antwoorde, opsommings en opvolgversoeke voor wat besprekings tussen studente nuttiger maak.

entries.source: Prepare for an exam
entries.value: Berei voor vir 'n eksamen

entries.source: Prepare for an exam with active recall
entries.value: Bereid jy vir op 'n examen met active recall

entries.source: Prepare for oral questioning
entries.value: Berei voor vir mondelinge vrae

entries.source: Prepare for oral questioning.
entries.value: Bereid jy vir op mondelinge vrae.

entries.source: Prepare for school, internship, job, or scholarship interviews with realistic questions and feedback.
entries.value: Berei voor vir skool-, internskap-, werk- of beursonderhoude met realistiese vrae en terugvoer.

entries.source: Prepare learners for oral exams through realistic questioning.
entries.value: Bereid leerders vir op mondelinge eksamens met realistiese vrae.

entries.source: Prepare speeches, presentations, interviews, or oral exams with prompts, timing, and feedback on structure.
entries.value: Berei toesprake, aanbiedings, onderhoude of mondelinge eksamens voor met aansporings, tydsberekening en terugvoer oor struktuur.

entries.source: Prepare study resources for classmates or a group: summaries, links, notes, explanations, and usage guidance.
entries.value: Berei studiehulpbronne voor vir klasmaats of 'n groep: opsommings, skakels, notas, verduidelikings en gebruiksleiding.

entries.source: Prepared courses, videos, and exercises are strongest when the learner knows the topic sequence.
entries.value: Voorbereide cursussen, video's en oefeningen is die sterkste wanneer die leerder die onderwerpvolgorde kent.

entries.source: Present an argument, wait for rebuttal, identify weak spots, and strengthen the learner's reasoning.
entries.value: Presenteer 'n argument, wag op weerlegging, identifiseer swak plekken en versterk die redenasie van die leerder.

entries.source: Present evidence, ask for decisions, reveal consequences, and debrief principles.
entries.value: Presenteer bewyse, vraag om besluiten, onthul gevolg en bespreek principes na.

entries.value: Persfeiten

entries.value: Primêre navigaansie

entries.value: Principes

entries.source: Prioritize assignments
entries.value: Prioritiseer opdragte

entries.source: Prioritize by urgency and effort, break tasks down, and update status.
entries.value: Prioriteer op urgentie en inspanning, breek take op en werk die status by.

entries.source: Prioritize topics
entries.value: Prioritiseer onderwerpe

entries.source: Prioritize topics.
entries.value: Prioriteer onderwerpe.

entries.source: Prioritize, schedule, add practice and review, then adjust as progress changes.
entries.value: Prioriteer, plan, voeg oefening en herhaling by en pas aan wanneer die voortgaanng verander.

entries.source: Prioritize, shrink oversized tasks, track progress, and close with a review.
entries.value: Prioriteer, verklein te grote take, volg voortgaanng en sluit af met 'n hersiening.

entries.source: Privacy
entries.value: Privaatheid

entries.source: Privacy policy
entries.value: Privaatheidsbeleid

entries.source: Privacy Policy
entries.value: Privaatheidsbeleid

entries.source: Privacy Policy | inspir
entries.value: Privaatheidsbeleid | inspir

entries.source: Private saved chat URLs are not sitemap-listed and are not included in llms.txt, llms-full.txt, or the JSON AI content catalog.
entries.value: URL's van privé gestoor chats staan nie in die sitemap en is nie opgenomen in llms.txt, llms-full.txt of die JSON AI-inhoudcatalogus.

entries.source: Private tutoring is powerful, but it is not equally available. A free public AI learning platform can help reduce that access gap by giving more people a patient first place to learn.
entries.value: Privébegeleiding is krachtig, maar nie vir almal even beskikbaar. 'n gratis openbaar AI-leerplatform kan help wat toegangskloof te verkleinn deur meer mense 'n geduldige eerste plek te gee om te leer.

entries.source: Private tutoring is powerful, but it is unevenly distributed. inspir uses AI to widen access while keeping the learner active: hints before answers, questions before lectures, and practice after explanation.
entries.value: Privébegeleiding is krachtig, maar ongelijk verdeeld. inspir gebruik AI om toegang te verbreen terwyl die leerder aktief bly: wenke vir antwoorde, vrae vir colleges en oefening na verduideliking.

entries.source: Project Coach
entries.value: Projekafrigter

entries.source: Project Coach AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Plan a school, creative, coding, or personal project with scope, milestones, blockers, and next actions.
entries.value: Project Coach AI Learning Mode is 'n gefokusde manier om AI te gebruik om te leer in plaas van passief antwoorde te versamel. Die modus is gebou rondom 'n spesifieke taak: 'n skool-, kreatiewe, kodeer- of persoonlik projek plannen met scope, mylpale, blokkades en volgende aksies.

entries.value: Project Coach AI Learning Mode: praktiese gids
